parents.subject: LU-13187 osd-ldiskfs: don't enforce max dir size limit on IAM objects

commit.subject: LU-9926 tests: sanity-pfl check client is connected
commit.message:
LU-9926 tests: sanity-pfl check client is connected

In sanity-pfl, the MDS is failed and the test could exit
before the client is properly connected back to the MDS.
Add a check that the client is connected to the MDS before
the test exits.

Test-Parameters: trivial envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes fstype=ldiskfs clientcount=2 osscount=1 ostcount=7 mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=sanity-pfl
Test-Parameters: envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes fstype=ldiskfs clientdistro=sles12sp5 serverdistro=el7.7 clientcount=2 osscount=1 ostcount=7 mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testlist=sanity-pfl
Test-Parameters: envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes fstype=zfs clientdistro=sles15sp1 serverdistro=el7.7 clientcount=2 osscount=1 ostcount=7 mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testlist=sanity-pfl
Signed-off-by: James Nunez <james.a.nunez@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ia2a6ade61fc11ba8529ddd13db133cd85fc7f298
